# Stackwrk

> Stackwrk builds fast, conversion-focused websites and web apps for small businesses: sites engineered to turn visitors into bookings, leads, and revenue. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and deployed on Vercel.

Stackwrk is a solo web-development studio (legal entity: Fox Solutions LLC). It designs and builds custom websites and web applications, then keeps them fast and converting with optional monthly care plans.

## What Stackwrk does

- Custom websites and web apps, designed to convert (not just look good)
- Booking/appointment widgets so customers can book 24/7
- Revenue calculators and interactive tools
- AI chat assistants that answer FAQs and capture leads
- Lead CRM: every enquiry tracked from "new" to "won"
- Automations, integrations, and ongoing growth work

## Free tools

- [Instant Website Audit](https://stackwrk.com/tools/website-audit): Free 0–100 scorecard for any website: speed, mobile, SEO, and conversion. No signup to see the score.
- [Website ROI Calculator](https://stackwrk.com/tools/roi-calculator): Estimate the monthly revenue a faster, higher-converting website could recover, based on your real traffic and average sale value.

## Pricing

- Projects typically start around $2,000 and scale with scope.
- Care plans (monthly): Essential $99, Growth $249, Partner $499: hosting, updates, security, backups, monitoring, and ongoing changes.

## Contact

- Book a free intro call: https://calendly.com/tal-foxamit-seatophomes/30min
